ShortDescription.Value: Show/Hide notification alert icons, add/remove Money, track Money, set Milestones.

Publish.LongDescription:
- City Watchdog helps reduce city alert icon clutter and adds convenient city setup tools. - It's modeled on the original City Controller mod (retired) - Many expanded features and future plans.
### Features
- Show or hide notification alert icons. - Change the milestone you start with (Trains now! Yes you can!).
#### Money
- Manual add/subtract money controls using hotkeys. - Automatic add money option. - Trend Tracker for money/population toolbar values. - Convert saves from Unlimited money type to normal Limited money.
Hotkeys - Shift+N = open/close panel (same as clicking on Top Left icon). - N = toggle all notification icons on/off (same as clicking on Toggle All * star button) - [ = Add Money - ] = Subtract Money
### Important Notes - City Watchdog hides/shows alert icons; it does not fix the problem behind the icons. Good for reducing stress or screenshots. - Make a backup before converting an Unlimited Money save. Mod cannot undo that conversion. - City Watchdog is a heavily rewritten redux/expansion of City Controller. It is not just a copy-paste release and nearly a whole rewrite. I hope you enjoy the new features, better performance, and safety guards! - CWD's Trend Tracker is a ground-up code write of similar money trend info to "Show Text Trends" (retired). Trends uses new methods to implement vanilla CS2 component extensions, custom CWD settings options, customizable new money tooltip layouts, and translations.
### Support and feedback Feedback is welcome through GitHub or Discord links on the right. If you like free mods, give a Like, easy way to show support :)
### Future - 9 languages supported now, more needed! - If anyone can make better Thumbnail and screenshots, please let me know.
### Credits - River Mochi - mod author and maintainer - Thanks to Mbyron26 for orig. City Controller mod. - Thanks to DanielVNZ for inspiration from Show Text Trends. - Dorkington - tester/feature suggestion - Flightech, SonNathan - testers - Thumbnail photograph by Maryia Shedava at Mont Saint-Michel in Normandy, France https://unsplash.com/photos/a-dog-poses-in-front-of-a-distant-castle-bEpjaU_CTcM
Publish.ChangeLog: - removed built-in Achievement Fixer tools - just install Achievement Fixer mod if you want achievements, it's easier.
